features.label: Built-in Proxy Manager
features.desc: HTTP aur SOCKS5 proxy support with host, port, username/password authentication. Settings → Proxy & Tor → type select karo → credentials fill karo → Save & Connect.
features.howto: Settings → Privacy & Performance → Proxy & Tor → HTTP ya SOCKS5 select karo.

features.label: Tor Network Integration
features.desc: Built-in Tor mode — traffic 3 encrypted relays se route hota hai. Bootstrap progress bar, circuit info (Guard → Relay → Exit), New Identity button with 10s cooldown.
features.howto: Settings → Proxy & Tor → Tor select karo → Auto Download → Start Tor → 100% pe Save & Connect.

features.label: Auto Tor Downloader
features.desc: tor.exe automatically download hota hai Tor Project ke official server se (~15MB). No manual install needed. Pure Node.js tar.gz extractor — koi external dependency nahi.
features.howto: Tor panel mein 'Auto Download Tor' button click karo — progress bar dikhega.

features.label: Real IP vs Current IP Display
features.desc: Proxy panel mein do tabs — Real IP (direct connection se) aur Current IP (proxy ke through). IPv4, IPv6, Country, Region, City, ZIP, Timezone, ISP, Org/AS, Lat/Lon, Mobile/Proxy detection sab dikhata hai.
features.howto: Settings → Proxy & Tor → status card mein Real IP / Current IP tabs switch karo.

features.label: Toolbar Proxy / Tor Indicator
features.desc: Jab proxy active ho toh toolbar mein blue PROXY badge dikhta hai. Tor mode mein purple TOR badge. Click karne pe directly proxy settings khulti hai.
features.howto: Proxy enable karo — toolbar mein badge automatically appear hoga.

features.label: Bypass List Editor
features.desc: Chip-style bypass rules editor — localhost, 127.0.0.1, ::1 default. Custom domains/IPs/CIDR ranges add karo jo proxy se bypass honge.
features.howto: Settings → Proxy & Tor → Bypass List section → domain add karo.

features.label: Proxy Setup Guide
features.desc: Settings ke proxy section mein 'How to use Proxy & Tor?' link — click karne pe floating panel khulta hai with step-by-step guide for HTTP, SOCKS5, Tor, Bypass List, aur Disable.
features.howto: Settings → Proxy & Tor → neeche 'How to use Proxy & Tor?' link click karo.

features.label: Tor Circuit Info & New Identity
features.desc: Active Tor circuit ka Guard → Relay → Exit node display. 'New Identity' button se fresh circuit milta hai — 10 second cooldown with countdown timer.
features.howto: Tor connected hone ke baad Circuit Info section mein nodes dikhenge.

features.label: Clean URL Display
features.desc: Address bar mein https://, www. hide ho jaata hai — sirf domain + path dikhta hai. Focus ya hover pe full URL wapas aata hai.
features.howto: Kisi bhi site pe jao — address bar mein clean URL dikhega. Click karo toh full URL.

features.label: Security Icons — HTTPS / HTTP / Local / Vortex
features.desc: HTTPS pe green lock, HTTP pe orange warning triangle, Local/IP (192.168.x.x, localhost, .local) pe blue home icon, vortex:// internal pages pe shield icon.
features.howto: Address bar ke left side mein icon automatically change hota hai.

features.label: Security Info Popup
features.desc: Security icon click karne pe popup — certificate info, connection type, aur HTTP sites pe 'Try HTTPS' button.
features.howto: Address bar mein lock/warning icon click karo.

features.label: Smart URL Detection
features.desc: 192.168.0.1, localhost, .local domains pe automatically http:// prefix lagta hai. localhost:3000 → http://localhost:3000 — port bhi handle hota hai.
features.howto: Address bar mein localhost:3000 type karo — automatically navigate hoga.

features.label: HTTP Site Favicon Support
features.desc: HTTP sites ka favicon bhi fetch hota hai — webview ke andar se base64 convert karke cache mein save hota hai.
features.howto: HTTP sites pe bhi tab mein favicon dikhega.

features.label: Favicon Cache System
features.desc: Domain-based local cache (favicon-cache.json) — hostname:port key, base64 encoded favicon. Max 500 entries, oldest delete. Offline bhi kaam karta hai. Tab create hote hi cached favicon/title instantly dikhta hai.
features.howto: Ek baar visit karo — agli baar tab instantly favicon ke saath khulega.

features.label: Omnibox Favicon
features.desc: Omnibox suggestions mein bhi cached favicon dikhta hai — history aur bookmarks dono mein.
features.howto: Address bar mein type karo — suggestions mein site icons dikhenge.

features.label: Address Bar Icons — Hover to Show
features.desc: Saare address bar icons (bookmark, permission, autofill, blocklist badge) default hidden rehte hain. Address bar hover ya focus pe smoothly appear hote hain.
features.howto: Address bar pe hover karo — icons fade in honge.

features.label: Bookmark Icon Always Visible When Bookmarked
features.desc: Agar page bookmarked hai toh bookmark icon hamesha visible + filled (teal color) rehta hai — hover ki zaroorat nahi.
features.howto: Koi page bookmark karo — icon hamesha dikhega.

features.label: WhatsApp Icon — Official Logo
features.desc: WhatsApp panel button mein official WhatsApp logo SVG use kiya — proper green color with glow effect.
features.howto: Toolbar mein WhatsApp button enable karo Settings → Appearance se.

features.label: Permission Icon Redesign
features.desc: Permission icon naya design — user silhouette with checkmark. Zyada intuitive aur clear.
features.howto: Kisi site pe permission request aane pe address bar mein icon dikhega.

features.label: Profile Dropdown — Smart Navigation
features.desc: Edit Profile button click karne pe Settings panel directly Profile tab pe open hota hai. Bookmarks count BookmarkStore se fresh load, Downloads count DownloadHistory se total.
features.howto: Toolbar mein profile icon → Edit Profile click karo.

features.label: Settings Active Tab Persist
features.desc: Settings panel refresh ya reopen karne pe same tab active rehta hai (sessionStorage). settings:navigate message se programmatically kisi bhi tab pe ja sakte ho.
features.howto: Settings kholo, koi tab select karo, band karo — dobara kholne pe same tab.

features.label: Update Badge in Tab Bar
features.desc: App start pe background mein version check hota hai. Naya version available hone pe tabbar mein green pulsing badge button appear hota hai. Click karne pe Settings → Updates tab directly open.
features.howto: Naya version release hone pe automatically badge dikhega.

features.label: Custom Download Folder
features.desc: Selected folder pe download hota hai — Desktop, custom folder kuch bhi. Settings → Downloads → folder pick karo.
features.howto: Settings → Downloads → Download Location → folder select karo.

features.label: Ask Before Download + Auto-Open
features.desc: Ask before download toggle — native OS save dialog. Auto-open on complete toggle — file automatically khulta hai. Settings change hone pe instantly apply — restart nahi.
features.howto: Settings → Downloads → Ask where to save / Open after download toggles.

features.label: YouTube Section Redesigned
features.desc: Settings → YouTube section completely redesigned — 3 layer badges visible, cleaner layout, better organization.
features.howto: Settings → Privacy & Performance → YouTube.

features.label: Remove Sponsored Cards & Homepage Promotions
features.desc: YouTube Sponsored Cards aur Homepage Promotions remove karne ke alag toggles. Better CSS selectors, faster ad skip.
features.howto: Settings → YouTube → Sponsored Cards / Homepage Promotions toggles.

features.label: Blocklist + YouTube Integration
features.desc: youtube-ads built-in list settings ke ytAdblock toggle se linked. Toggle karo → engine reload → IMA SDK block/unblock automatically.
features.howto: Settings → YouTube → Ad Blocker toggle — blocklist engine bhi sync hota hai.

features.label: Real IP not showing in Proxy panel
features.desc: net.request Electron 28 mein session option reliably kaam nahi karta tha. Fix: session.fromPartition('persist:proxy-ip-check') use karo aur proxyRules: 'direct://' force karo.

features.label: Internet drops when Tor starts
features.desc: Proxy Tor start hone se pehle hi set ho jaati thi — sab traffic fail. Fix: applyProxy() Tor ke liye sirf tab proxy set karta hai jab bootstrap 100% ho (onTorReady callback).

features.label: Google logout on Tor enable
features.desc: Abrupt proxy change se Google ka IP mismatch security logout trigger karta tha. Fix: Tor proxy sirf fully connected hone ke baad apply hoti hai.

features.label: Proxy listener accumulation on re-render
features.desc: ProxyState.on() har panel open pe naye listeners add karta tha. Fix: clearAll() on mount, unsubscribe functions stored in _unsubs array.

features.label: Bookmark check using wrong URL
features.desc: Bookmark check bar.value (clean URL) se ho raha tha — actual URL se nahi. Fix: bar.dataset.fullUrl se check — bookmark button properly marked/unmarked.

features.label: IPC events double-bind in proxy panel
features.desc: Settings panel baar baar open/close karne pe duplicate IPC events fire hote the. Fix: _ipcBound flag — events sirf ek baar bind hote hain.
